channel.title: York County Registry of Deeds
channel.description: No dedicated registry news/RSS feed exists; monitored by full-page fingerprint of the official registry page. Has the most news-like content of the 16 registries via its 'Archives & History Articles' section.

item.title: Monitoring started: York County Registry of Deeds
item.description: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
